title: nf-clingen parameter schema
description: Schema for the nf-clingen clinical-genealogy routing workflow.

reads.description: Glob pattern for paired-end FASTQ inputs. Required unless --samplesheet is supplied.

samplesheet.description: Optional CSV manifest with columns sample_id,r1,r2. Supports local or s3:// paths. When set, --reads is ignored.

reference.description: Reference FASTA used for alignment and variant calling.

outdir.description: Published output directory for pipeline artifacts and reports.

scratch_dir.description: Optional fast local scratch path. When set, Nextflow workDir becomes <scratch_dir>/nf-clingen-work.

skip_qc.description: Bypass FASTQC and FASTP when true.

clinvar_vcf.description: Optional ClinVar VCF used to overlay local clinical assertions.

max_report_variants.description: Maximum number of prioritized variants retained in clinical report tables.

patient_phenotype.description: Optional HPO term string used to phenotype-filter clinical results.

phenotype_gene_map.description: Gene-to-phenotype mapping TSV used when patient_phenotype is set.

max_cpus.description: Global CPU ceiling used by local execution profiles only (adaptive_local/aggressive_local). Ignored in AWS mode.

max_ram_gb.description: Global RAM budget in GB used by auto-scaled process memory settings on local hosts. Ignored in AWS mode.

max_forks.description: Maximum concurrent tasks for local execution only. Ignored in AWS mode.

deepvariant_cpus.description: CPU allocation for the DeepVariant task.

execution_mode.description: Execution environment selector. local = host-managed resources; aws = AWS Batch-managed scheduling.

aws_region.description: AWS region used when execution_mode is aws and profile awsbatch is selected.

aws_batch_queue.description: AWS Batch job queue name used by the awsbatch profile.

aws_workdir.description: S3 work directory for Nextflow cache in AWS mode (for example s3://my-bucket/nf-clingen-work). Required in aws mode.

vqsr_snp_resource.description: Optional HapMap SNP truth resource for GATK VQSR on hg38.

vqsr_omni_resource.description: Optional Omni 2.5 SNP training resource for GATK VQSR on hg38.

vqsr_indel_resource.description: Optional Mills and 1000G gold standard indel resource for GATK VQSR on hg38.

vqsr_1kg_resource.description: Optional 1000G phase1 SNP training resource for GATK VQSR on hg38.

vqsr_dbsnp_resource.description: Optional dbSNP known-sites resource for GATK VQSR reporting on hg38.

help.description: Print workflow help derived from the schema and exit.

validate_only.description: Validate parameters against the schema and exit before execution.
